rationale: The DOI match confirms the 2006 paper directly cites the 2002 JMKR article, and the construct overlap is substantial: both notes center on processing fluency/implicit-memory mechanisms (including conceptual vs perceptual fluency) in advertising-driven brand judgments. Because the citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior processing-fluency research, this cited work is plausibly a foundational/mechanism source rather than an obvious incidental mention.
